rationale: Top-of-form domestic business-corporation name. Domestic Maine filing — uses entity.name (not entity.home_jurisdiction_name).

label_verbatim: FIRST: ... and the effective date of the conversion is (date) ___
rationale: Effective date of the foreign nonprofit conversion. Reuses existing conversion.future_effective_date key per MBCA-20 / MBCA-20B / MBCA-21 precedent — semantically the same conversion-effective-date concept, even though FIRST here is mandatory (vs. MBCA-20's optional FOURTH).

label_verbatim: THIRD: The corporation's new jurisdiction of incorporation is ___
rationale: State or country where the corporation is reincorporating as a foreign nonprofit. Novel to the outbound (Maine → foreign) conversion direction — MBCA-20 / MBCA-21 stay within Maine and don't have this concept; MBCA-20A is the first form requiring it.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: ... shall provide a mailing address to which the Secretary of State may mail a copy of any process served on the Secretary of State (mailing address)
rationale: Forwarding mailing address for SOS-as-agent appointment, specifically for shareholder appraisal-rights process under 13-C ch.13. Distinct from filing.contact.* (cover-letter contact) and from merger.foreign_survivor.service_of_process_mailing_address (MBCA-10's parallel SOS-agent address for foreign survivors of a merger).

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of an officer or other duly authorized representative) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget. Shape D (matches MBCA-11 / MLLC-12 / MBCA-20 / MBCA-20B / MBCA-21). Form footnote requires 'an officer or other duly authorized representative' per 13-C MRSA §934.1; signature line is wet-ink (no AcroForm widget).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($90 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email. Note: the surrendering corporation will no longer have Maine annual-report obligations post-effective-date, so this field is typically left blank on charter-surrender filings.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
